summary: Frontend-only verification of the Turkish user's change request: (a) currency is LOCKED per-project across income/expense/payment forms, (b) receipt (dekont) upload is present on the income form, (c) receipts are OPTIONAL for both income and payment forms. Flow: admin login (admin@arigastro.com/admin123) -> POST /api/auth/login 200. Went to /projeler, opened new-project-btn sheet, selected first customer via project-customer-select combobox, filled name='TEST_LOCKED_CUR_TRY_ZZ' + amount=10000, changed currency select to TRY, saved -> POST /api/projects 200, response currency='TRY' confirmed. Opened /projeler/<id>. INCOME: add-income-btn opens dialog; data-testid=income-currency-fixed present with text 'TRY' (locked badge, NOT a dropdown -- verified role='combobox' count inside income-dialog = 0); data-testid=upload-receipt-btn present. Saved income with amount=5000 and NO receipt -> POST /api/projects/<id>/incomes 200, response currency='TRY', receipts=[] (optional confirmed); income rendered in list with '5.000' and '₺' (project currency). EXPENSE: add-expense-btn opens dialog; expense-currency-fixed badge shows 'TRY', combobox count inside expense-dialog = 0; saved expense (name='TEST_Malzeme', total_debt=2000, no initial payment) -> POST /api/projects/<id>/expenses 200, currency='TRY'. PAYMENTS: opened expense row -> expense-detail-dialog; payment-currency-fixed badge shows 'TRY', combobox count inside dialog = 0; save-payment-btn saved payment amount=500 with NO receipt -> POST /api/projects/<id>/expenses/<eid>/payments 200, currency='TRY', receipts empty. All amounts (Projektsumme ₺10.000,00, Erhaltene Zahlungen ₺5.000,00, Ausgaben ₺2.000,00, Zahlung ₺500,00, Offen ₺1.500,00, Gewinn ₺8.000,00) render with TRY (₺) symbol on the summary strip. Cleanup: deleted test project via delete-project-<id> -> DELETE /api/projects/<id> 200. No console errors; no Cloudflare bot-block on this run.
critical_code_review_comments: ProjeDetay.jsx correctly derives `currency = data?.summary?.currency || 'EUR'` from the loaded project and threads it into income/expense/payment POST bodies -- guarantees server-side rows use project currency regardless of what a user could try to set client-side.

CurrencyBadge component renders a read-only <div> (no <Select>, no <input>), so the currency is unambiguously non-editable in all three dialogs -- confirmed by asserting role='combobox' count = 0 inside income-dialog, expense-dialog, expense-detail-dialog.

ReceiptField + hidden <input type=file> pattern is now consistent across income, expense-initial-payment and payment forms; upload-receipt-btn testid is reused in all three but they live in different dialogs (unique by ancestor), so tests must scope by dialog when multiple are open -- currently only one is open at a time so no conflict.

Backend response inconsistency (very minor, non-blocking): the income endpoint returned `receipts: []` while the payment endpoint returned `receipts: null` for the same 'no receipt uploaded' scenario. Both parse as falsy in the UI (thumbs section is hidden), but for API contract cleanliness consider defaulting to an empty list on serialization for payments too (backend concern).

The payment currency badge correctly binds to `activeExp.currency` (per-expense), which itself was created equal to project currency at add-expense time -- this preserves the lock even if a stale project is later mutated (defense in depth).
seed_data_creation: Created 1 project 'TEST_LOCKED_CUR_TRY_ZZ' (customer=first available='Esra Butik', amount=10000 TRY) with 1 income (₺5000), 1 expense ('TEST_Malzeme', ₺2000) and 1 payment (₺500). ALL cleaned up at the end via delete-project-<id> -> DELETE /api/projects/<id> 200. Preview data is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For clicking the project-customer-select combobox trigger inside the create-project Sheet, Playwright's standard .click() may fail with 'Element is outside of the viewport' at viewport 1920x1080 even after scrollIntoViewIfNeeded because the sheet is a right-side panel and the trigger sits below the header. Workarounds that both work: (1) set viewport to 1600x1200 or wider height, or (2) use `await page.eval_on_selector('[data-testid="project-customer-select"]', 'el => el.click()')` to bypass actionability. Same for `project-currency-select`. The income/expense/payment dialogs render centered and do not have this issue. Key testids in ProjeDetay: add-income-btn, add-expense-btn, income-dialog, expense-dialog, expense-detail-dialog, income-currency-fixed, expense-currency-fixed, payment-currency-fixed, upload-receipt-btn (present in all three dialogs -- scope selectors by dialog), income-amount-input, expense-name-input, expense-debt-input, payment-amount-input, save-income-btn, save-expense-btn, save-payment-btn, income-receipt-thumb-<id>-<i>, expense-row-<id>. Payment endpoint returns `receipts: null` while income returns `receipts: []` (minor API contract inconsistency, not a bug).
rca of the issue: N/A -- this iteration is a verification pass on an already-shipped change; no regressions were found. The implemented approach (currency derived from project + read-only CurrencyBadge in every child form + backend accepting `receipts: List[str] = []` on ProjectIncomeCreate) correctly enforces both requirements (currency lock and optional receipts) end-to-end.
